title: stipa tenuissima var. oreophila
intro: Stipa tenuissima var. oreophila, also known as Mexican feather grass, is a type of ornamental grass native to Mexico. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which are derived from its essential oils and saponins. The health benefits of Mexican feather grass include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and promoting overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Stipa tenuissima var. oreophila can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to aid in digestion, relieve stress, and boost the immune system.
